basic_details.job_title: DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Raisen (DLSA Raisen) Vehicle Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have passed 10th Pass from a recognized institution along with a valid Driving License and driving experience are eligible to apply for these Vehicle Driver vacancies. The offline application process for DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 has started on 11 May 2026 and will remain open until 30 May 2026. Candidates can download the

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass from recognized institution, Valid Driving License, Experience in driving all types of vehicles, Preference: Qualified Mechanic
qualification.details: 10th Pass from a recognized institution. Valid Driving License. Experience in driving all types of vehicles. Preference will be given to candidates who are qualified mechanics.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver recruitment is 30 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th grade from a recognized institution. Additionally, a valid driving license and experience in driving all types of vehicles are mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any preference for certain candidates in the DLSA Raisen recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who are qualified mechanics. This is an added advantage for applicants applying for the Vehicle Driver position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Vehicle Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Personal Interview and a Practical Driving Test. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DLSA Raisen Vehicle Driver job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Vehicle Driver in the District Legal Services Authority Raisen recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for this post. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Raisen. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.
